description: Default pump-first Birdeye meme-list recipes for small-ticket post-graduation research. The pack keeps two very fresh probes, then leans on the 30m to 60m continuation windows that already produced usable pass-grade names in the calibration run.

recipes.name: grad_10m_last_trade
recipes.description: Very fresh graduates from the last ten minutes ranked by live tape recency.

recipes.name: grad_10m_graduated_time
recipes.description: Freshest graduates ranked by graduation time with a still-live tape.

recipes.name: grad_30m_volume5m
recipes.description: Recent graduates ranked by immediate 5m dollar flow, but with a slightly lower tape floor to improve small-ticket recall.

recipes.name: grad_45m_live_tape
recipes.description: Graduates still printing a live tape, with enough recent flow to matter on small tickets.

recipes.name: grad_60m_trade5m
recipes.description: One-hour graduate scan ranked by 5m tape count, eased slightly so the lab sees more usable follow-through names.
